:::{#thm-deriv-odds}
#### Derivative of odds function

$$\doddsf{\prob} = \derivf{\odds}{\prob} = \frac{1}{\sqf{1-\prob}}$$
:::

{{< slidebreak >}}

::: proof

We can use [odds as a function of probability](binary-outcome-associations.qmd#thm-prob-to-odds) and the [quotient rule](math-prereqs.qmd#thm-quotient-rule):

$$
\ba
\derivf{\odds}{\prob}
   &= \deriv{\pi}\paren{\frac{\pi}{1-\pi}}
\\ &=  \frac {\deriv{\pi}\pi} {1-\pi} -
       \paren{\frac{\pi}{\sqf{1-\pi}} \cd \deriv{\pi}\paren{1-\pi}}
\\ &=  \frac{1}{1-\pi} - \frac{\pi}{\sqf{1-\pi}} \cd (-1)
\\ &=  \frac{1}{1-\pi} + \frac{\pi}{\sqf{1-\pi}}
\\ &=  \frac{1-\pi}{\sqf{1-\pi}} + \frac{\pi}{\sqf{1-\pi}}
\\ &=  \frac{1-\pi + \pi}{\sqf{1-\pi}}
\\ &=  \frac{1}{\sqf{1-\pi}}
\ea
$$

:::

{{< slidebreak >}}

:::{#cor-deriv-odds}

#### Derivative of odds function in terms of odds

$$\derivf{\odds}{\prob} = \sqf{1+\odds}$$

:::

{{< slidebreak >}}

::: proof

Using @thm-deriv-odds and [one plus odds in terms of non-event probability](binary-outcome-associations.qmd#cor-inverse-odds-nonevent):

$$
\ba
\derivf{\odds}{\prob}
&= \frac{1}{\sqf{1-\prob}}
&& \text{(derivative of odds function)}
\\ &= \sqf{\frac{1}{1-\prob}}
&& \text{(the reciprocal of a square is the square of the reciprocal)}
\\ &= \sqf{1+\odds}
&& \text{(substitute } \frac{1}{1-\prob} = 1+\odds\text{)}
\ea
$$

:::
